name: Green Tomato Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out half of the dough and line a 9-inch pie plate with it.
2. Mix 1 tablespoon of flour with 1/2 cup of sugar and sprinkle over the bottom of the crust.
3. Layer tomatoes and lemon slices on top of the sugar mixture.
4. Combine the remaining sugar, salt, and flour. Sprinkle this mixture over the tomatoes and dot with butter.
5. Roll out the remaining dough and cover the tomatoes with it.
6. Make slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
7. Bake for 10 minutes at 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Reduce the heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for another 30 minutes.
